title: Column setting string order
excerpt:

posts.author: gary (Gary Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am getting options for status columns and show them on my app, but problem is the order in which I get these options in setting string is different from actual order on UI?

Is there something I am missing or is this how it is?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @gary,

Do you mind including a screenshot of what you’re seeing on your end? This way I can better understand where you’re seeing this mis-ordering. Feel free to DM me too, if you’d prefer.

Thanks!
Helen

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For others:

This is actually a feature request for customizing Status label order as it appears in UI!

-Helen
